metadata.releaseNotes: Coinbase is the easiest and most trusted place to buy, sell, and manage your digital currency. This update includes bug fixes and performance improvements.
metadata.description:
Coinbase is the most trusted platform to securely buy, sell, trade, stake, invest and earn - crypto, stocks, prediction markets, derivatives, and more. We’re the first publicly traded crypto exchange in the U.S. and the only crypto company listed on the S&P 500.

SUPPORTED ASSETS
Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), XRP (XRP), Solana (SOL), USD Coin (USDC), Cardano (ADA), Polygon (MATIC), Polkadot (DOT), Tether (USDT), Dai (DAI), VeThor Token (VTHO), Pepe (PEPE), SHIBA INU (SHIB), Dogecoin (DOGE), and many other cryptocurrencies.

Here’s a taste of what Coinbase offers:

BUY, SELL & MANAGE CRYPTO
Coinbase is the most trusted platform to build, manage, and track your crypto portfolio
Explore and trade millions of crypto assets¹
Easily set up automatic or recurring buys
Earn rewards on stablecoins like USDC²
Stake crypto and earn rewards on cryptocurrencies like Ethereum and Cardano³
Pay with crypto: Securely and seamlessly send and receive crypto
Seamlessly transfer crypto internationally

reviews.author: Tessa02L
reviews.title: Most exceedingly remarkable and extremely exceptional cryptocurrency recovery technology expertise!
reviews.content:
Please read carefully, I lost my money few weeks ago in bitcoin investment.
I lost over $185,065 they denied my withdrawal request and also left it pending. I reached out to them and they never responded back to my emails and calls. They eventually locked me out of my account I had reach out a recovery experts at Xaintrecoveryexp@ gMailcom to help me recover all my money back. They're the best when it comes to crypto recovery. Thankfully I have gotten my money back.

reviews.author: Rubetube17
reviews.title: Theft at its finest
reviews.content: This app literally steals money from you. I’ve been trying to cancel my account for the last six months and keep getting charged 4.99 even though I’ve clearly gone ahead and canceled my account. There’s no actual way to go ahead and close out your account when you have less than two dollars in your account. I’ve reached out to help support and they’ve continually told me that they cannot help. It wasn’t until I told them that I literally want off the platform and they can keep my money and delete my data, was it complete. I literally just got charged another $4.99 today and even after cancellation they still kept my money. Actually insane. Do yourself a favor and go find a completely different platform than Coinbase. It’s trash and the customer service is the worst I’ve ever experienced.
